nasb.text: The unassailable fortifications of your walls He will bring down, Lay low and cast to the ground, even to the dust.

esv.text: And the high fortifications of his walls he will bring down, lay low, and cast to the ground, to the dust.

cnv.text: 耶和華必使他們高聳而堅固的城牆傾倒下陷，落在地面，變作塵土。”

ccb.text: 祂必拆毁他们高大坚固的城墙，将其夷为平地、化为尘土。

csbs.text: 耶和华必使你墙厚壁高的堡垒 倾倒、落败、坠落在地、变为尘土。
